{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. No one comes in on days like this — not a complaint, just observation. I've been looking at the same object on the shelf for twenty minutes. A small ceramic thing. I don't know what it is for. I think that's why I keep looking at it.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "low",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "at_object",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "The ceramic thing — white, no glaze on the bottom, slight wobble in the base. Not a bowl. Not a cup. Something between. I don't know what it holds yet. Maybe that's okay.",
      "impulse": 0.4
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.45,
    "curiosity": 0.5,

  }
}
